title: [ADDON] City Roads 16x
description: Beautify your roads with City Roads: 16x16 textures!
body:
# 📰 〡 Presentation

**Beautify your roads** with City Roads!
Numerous road markings add realism to your 🏢 **city**.

Designed to complement the **[🛣️ City Roads](https://modrinth.com/mod/city-roads)** mod, this pack brings **16x16 textures**, in order to align with the vibe of Minecraft.
